name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: ❗ BREAKING: Roe v. Wade officially at risk
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c723b/24c69fd9/f9414e0b/18e1ec7b/2189937182/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE139N_digital_email_20170131_TrumpSCOTUS_n-all&source=WQEFE139N_digital_email_20170131_TrumpSCOTUS_n-all")
---

Peter,

Donald Trump has announced Neil Gorsuch as his pick for the Supreme Court.

As we expected, Trump's pick has a long anti-choice record and absolutely can't be trusted to uphold _Roe v. Wade_.

Gorsuch played a fundamental role in the _Hobby Lobby_ decision that allows employers to block workers' access to contraception. When the case reached his court, he sided with Hobby Lobby's owners in stating that emergency contraception and IUDs cause abortion -- which is 100 percent untrue. Gorsuch is only 49 years old, meaning he could potentially serve on the Court for decades after Trump is no longer president.

**[We need to double down on raising resources to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women. Donate $3 now to help elect women who will protect _Roe v. Wade_. ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c723b/24c69fd9/f9414e0b/18e1ec74/2189937182/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170131_email_TrumpSCOTUS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+double+down+on+raising+resour&utm_campaign=WQEFE139N_digital_email_20170131_TrumpSCOTUS_n-all&source=WQEFE139N_digital_email_20170131_TrumpSCOTUS_n-all")**

This is the same Supreme Court seat that has been open for nearly A YEAR because Senate Republicans blocked President Obama's nominee, Judge Merrick Garland.

Now they're reaping the rewards of their bad behavior -- a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land.

We can't count on the current White House, the new court, OR congressional Republicans to protect our constitutional rights.

If we want to stop the trend of women's access to safe, legal abortion being chipped away, then we need to commit to electing pro-choice Democratic women at EVERY level of office.

**Are you ready to fight back with everything we have? Donate $3 now to help elect a wave of pro-choice Democratic champions:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defend-Roe](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c723b/24c69fd9/f9414e0b/18e1ec75/2189937182/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170131_email_TrumpSCOTUS?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefendRoe&utm_campaign=WQEFE139N_digital_email_20170131_TrumpSCOTUS_n-all&source=WQEFE139N_digital_email_20170131_TrumpSCOTUS_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: re: Trump's Supreme Court nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Donald Trump just named his pick to the Supreme Court, and now, we all have to prepare for what comes next. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec17/2b07114c/4414b3ce/736977e9/2037103609/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-scotusnominee?source=PT-20170131-Breaking-ProsHV")
---
Friend --

Donald Trump just named his pick to the Supreme Court, and now, we all have to prepare for what comes next.

Judge Neil Gorsuch is a federal judge from Colorado. In the Hobby Lobby case he rejected the Affordable Care Act's contraception coverage mandate. And he's exactly the kind of right-wing ideologue who will come to the bench ready to roll back progress and pave the way for Trump to build his wall, ban Muslims, and repeal Obamacare.

We get one chance to stop this nomination, so tonight, Senate Democrats are preparing to hold the line.

[**Will you let Senate Democrats know you 're standing with them to block Trump's Supreme Court pick? **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec17/2b07114c/4414b3ce/736977e9/2037103609/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-scotusnominee?source=PT-20170131-Breaking-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name:** Friend
****Last Petition Signed** : **N/A
**Protect the Supreme Court:**[**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec17/2b07114c/4414b3ce/736977e9/2037103609/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-scotusnominee?source=PT-20170131-Breaking-ProsHV")

We're just 11 days into Trump's presidency, and we've already seen how important it is to have an independent judiciary that can uphold the civil rights of those his administration tries to isolate and target.

**But if Gorsuch tips the balance of the Supreme Court, we'll lose more fights than we win and deal with the repercussions for decades.**

Going forward, Senate Democrats will face immense pressure to fold and allow the Republicans to rubber stamp this nomination.

We know that the Koch brothers, for instance, are targeting Elizabeth Warren with $100,000 in attacks. POLITICO reported today that, across the country, conservative forces are preparing to spend $10 million dollars targeting Democratic senators with ugly, negative ads.

That's why tonight is so important, Friend.

[**Please, add your name to support our lawmakers in this fight for the Supreme Court >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec17/2b07114c/4414b3ce/736977e9/2037103609/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-scotusnominee?source=PT-20170131-Breaking-ProsHV")

Thank you,
Team DSCC

****A quick note on donations, Friend:****

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Let's connect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

I'm not going to pretend I wasn't disappointed on Election Day. Hillary Clinton would have made an incredible president and it would have been a great honor to work alongside her.

But now that I'm back in the Senate, our work is as important as ever. The Senate Democratic minority is like the emergency brake on a train and we have to stand up every day for our values and the people we care about.

**Everyday I make a difference as Virginia 's senator. That's why I'm running for reelection -- and I hope to have your support. **

To start, I'm asking you to connect with me on social media. It's a great way to stay in touch and exchange ideas on the pressing issues facing Virginia and our country. **I hope you 'll follow me on [Facebook](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MzMSxO796TIWdDxBptLxpija1RQPkuHg), [Twitter](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=U76On%2FKOXfl41uy250A7%2FCja1RQPkuHg), and [Instagram](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YklcM4g%2BAg7c6LasiOY0cyja1RQPkuHg)** where I'll share news, highlights from my travels around Virginia, and some fun stuff, too (maybe even some harmonica videos!).

Derek, I can't thank you enough for being on my team.

Take care,
Tim

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Jeff Sessions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
If you want to know how important the role of the United States Attorney General is, look no further than Sally Yates. It is the responsibility and the duty of the Attorney General to serve all Americans, and Sally Yates stood up for what is right in ways that I do not believe that Senator Jeff Sessions would.
After reviewing Senator Sessions' record, his testimony before the Judiciary Committee, and reports of his influence on the development of President Trump's backdoor Muslim ban that will make our country less safe, I do not have confidence that Senator Sessions would be an independent Attorney General who would put the rights of all Americans before the whims of this President.
That is why I will be opposing his nomination for United States Attorney General.
[**If you agree, please sign my petition to say that you oppose the nomination of Senator Sessions for Attorney General.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0d/2a380d31/1419d9ce/fed624/2797975481/VEsH/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/voting-no-on-jeff-sessions?source=e20170201_sessions_all")
This is not a matter of personal politics or party lines. Senator Sessions has a long and troubling history of standing against the human and civil rights of individuals, rights that are essential to our civic and economic progress as a country.
We thrive economically when we fully include every member of our community, and it's clear to me that Senator Sessions fails to grasp this concept. A GOP-led Judiciary committee once even refused to confirm him because of his questionable record on race, and his record of opposing equality for women and the LGBTQ community is equally concerning.
**His record makes it clear: Senator Sessions is unfit to serve as Attorney General.[If you agree, add your name.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0d/2a380d31/1419d9ce/fed624/2797975481/VEsE/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/voting-no-on-jeff-sessions?source=e20170201_sessions_all")**
Thank you for speaking up for what is right.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0d/2a380d31/1419d9ce/fed626/2797975481/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: where we stand on Trump's Supreme Court pick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
If Judge Gorsuch won't demonstrate the type of independence necessary to defend the Constitution from abuses of the Executive branch, then we will oppose his confirmation. [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170201-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend --

Last night, President Trump named his pick to the Supreme Court.

Neil Gorsuch is a federal judge for the 10th Circuit in Colorado. He was appointed by George W. Bush. Throughout his career, he's repeatedly sided with corporations over working people, rejected women's rights, and embraced a retrograde judicial philosophy.

Senate Democrats are ready for this fight. We're going to demand an exhaustive, robust, and comprehensive debate on Judge Gorsuch's fitness to be a Supreme Court justice -- and just like President Obama's Supreme Court nominees who all met a 60 vote threshold in the Senate, we're going to insist on the same for this administration's nominees.

[**We just need you to add your voice to ours. Will you chip in $1 to show that we're all standing together?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170201-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

A little more than a week into the Trump presidency, and we've already seen how it's imperative to maintain an independent judiciary that can uphold the civil rights of those this administration tries to isolate and target.

If Judge Gorsuch won't demonstrate the type of independence necessary to defend the Constitution from abuses of the Executive branch, then we will oppose his confirmation.

**But to hold the line, we're going to need your help.**

In the days ahead, President Trump's allies will try to flood the airwaves to drown out the voices opposing this nomination. They'll spend millions of dollars attacking Democrats who represent our values in this debate.

We need to match their energy -- and their resources. If we do, we can show the entire country that we're galvanized in our opposition to the President's full agenda -- and blunt whatever momentum he's trying to build.

[**Donate $1 right now.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170201-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,
Chuck

body:
---
**Donald Trump has already started running for re-election, so we need to get a jump-start on taking him down for good. Chip in $3 or more to help:

** **[PITCH IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7ba/4067b0a/2c564b08b/7e7bc2f3/1043681556/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PITCH+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170201_lr_nd&source=em_20170201_lr_nd")**
Friend --

On January 20th, Donald Trump did something completely unprecedented for a newly inaugurated president:

He launched his re-election campaign. And 12 days in, he has already started aggressively fundraising.

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170201_lr_nd&source=em_20170201_lr_nd")
Last night, his campaign announced that they had $7 million in the bank as of January 1st. If they match that every month until November 3rd, 2020 -- and that's not a very high bar to clear -- it would add up to more than $300 million.

I know the past two weeks have been a whirlwind, and the idea of thinking ahead three years may sound exhausting. But Donald already is.

We can't get caught unprepared. And there's a lot that we can start doing right now with your help -- growing state parties, building technology infrastructure, creating a research library of every last speck of information on Trump and his administration.

So can I count on your help tonight to give us a jump-start on taking down Trump for good? Chip in $3 or more right now and help us in this effort.
